metadata.title: Synaply - Manalis na Vocabulary tan AI & Spaced Repetition
metadata.description: Paaligwasen so kabat mo ed lenguahe panamegley na AI-powered spaced repetition. Man-gawa na sarilim a listaan na salita odino manalis manlapud saray public list na komunidad.
metadata.keywords: manalis na english, spaced repetition, vocabulary builder, flashcards, AI language learning, word lists, language study app, manalis na spanish, manalis na french, manalis na german, language proficiency, memorisay salita, SRS learning
metadata.og_title: Synaply - Masirib a Panag-aral na Vocabulary
metadata.og_description: Paaligwasen so kabat mo ed lenguahe panamegley na AI-powered spaced repetition. Man-aral na mas maples, nodnonoten na mas mabayag.
metadata.og_image_alt: Synaply AI Language Learning App Interface
metadata.twitter_title: Synaply - Man-aral na Balon Salita ya Ag-makaaba
metadata.twitter_description: Mila ed Synaply pian pabaleguen so vocabulary mo panamegley na masirib a spaced repetition tan AI.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Man-aaral na {target} manlapud {source}
dashboard.community_lists_desc: Nengnengen so saray public word list tan playlist manlapud arum a manag-usar.
dashboard.ai_practice_desc: Paaligwasen so vocabulary mo panamegley na pan-translate na saray AI-generated a sentence base ed anggano anton topic odino listaan na salita mo.
dashboard.manage_words_desc: Nengnengen, anapen, i-edit odino i-delete so saray salita manlapud koleksion mo.
dashboard.import_success: Mapalar a na-import so saray salita!
dashboard.import_error_retry: Ag-mi na-save so balon salita mo. Subokan tayo lamet na aminsan!
dashboard.select_topic_error: Mitoling, man-pili na topic odino i-enter so sarilim a konteksto.
dashboard.ai_translation_notice: Ontulong so AI ed definisyon tan alimbawan sentence
dashboard.usage_example: Alimbawa na panag-usar odino saray nota
dashboard.delete_confirm: Seguradon labay mon i-delete iyan salita?
dashboard.delete_all_confirm: Seguradon labay mon i-delete AMIN a salita mo? Ag-la napa-wil iya.
dashboard.all_words_deleted: Amin a salita et na-delete la!
dashboard.no_words_found: Anggapoy naboan a salita. Subokan so arum a search term odino man-arum na saray salita!
dashboard.no_words_for_lesson: Anggapoy naboan a salita ya aralen. Mitoling, man-arum na balon salita ed listaan mo!
dashboard.no_words_to_review: Anggapoy rebyuen mon salita natan ya agew. Pawil ka na mas mabiit odino man-arum na balon salita!
dashboard.lesson_complete_desc: Maong ya kimey! Na-rebyu mo la so saray salita mo natan ya agew.
dashboard.practice_setup_desc: I-enter so topic pian man-gawa na custom practice sentence parad sika!
dashboard.practice_topic_hint: No andi-karga iya, man-gawa na sentence base ed vocabulary mo.
dashboard.footer_help_text: Tulongan kami pian onaligwas! I-share so saray ideya mo, i-report so saray bug, odino man-request na saray feature:
dashboard.support_desc: No labay mo iyan app, nayarin suportaan mo so kimey na pamaaligwas ed saya.

onboarding.journey_begins: Say biahem ed kaba-tan na lenguahe et onggapo dia.
onboarding.strategy_desc: Pian na-ala so sankaabigan ed Synaply, rekomendaan mi iyan simplin istratehiya:
onboarding.step1_desc: Man-arum na manga 100 ya salita ya konektado ed sankasakey a topic (alimbawa: Business odino Travel) pian man-gawa na mabiskeg a konteksto.
onboarding.step2_desc: Kaba-tan irayan salita panamegley na inagew-agew a repetition anggad magmaliw iran kabiangan na vocabulary mo.
onboarding.step3_desc: Onalis ed Panag-ensayo na AI pian usaren so balon vocabulary mo ed saray interon sentence tan real-world a situwasyon.
onboarding.got_it: A-ala ko la, iggapo tayo la!

dashboard.generate_ai_title: Man-gawa na Word List panamegley na AI
dashboard.custom_topic_placeholder: alimbawa: Salita parad business meeting nipaakar ed marketing
dashboard.publish_desc: I-share iyan koleksion na {count} ya salita ed arum a manag-usar. Nanengneng iya ed Public Lists gallery.
dashboard.publish_success: Mapalar a na-publish so word list!
dashboard.duplicate_word_error: Say salita ya "{word}" et wadia la ed listaan
dashboard.inline_add_error: Mitoling, itarya so original a salita tan translation
dashboard.save_batch_success: Mapalar a na-save so {count} ya salita ed listaan mo!
dashboard.save_batch_error: Ag-nayarin i-save so saray salita. Mitoling, subokan lamet.
dashboard.remove_duplicates_error: Mitoling, i-ekal so saray duplicate ya salita antis ya i-save.
dashboard.remove_duplicates_publish_error: Mitoling, i-ekal so saray duplicate ya salita antis ya i-publish.

ai_word_info.error_coffee_break: Say AI et man-ko-coffee break ni. Mitoling, subokan lamet na mabiit!
ai_word_info.error_generic: Ay! Ag-mi na-ala so saray insight na AI. Subokan tayo lamet!

public_lists.title: Saray Public Word List
public_lists.subtitle: Nengnengen so saray word list ya na-gawa na arum a manag-usar parad lenguahe mo.
public_lists.search_placeholder: Man-anap na saray listaan base ed titulo odino deskripsion...
public_lists.no_lists_desc: Subokan so arum a search odino salian so lenguahe ya filter.
public_lists.show_all_langs: I-panengneng so saray listaan parad amin a lenguahe
public_lists.load_error: Ag-mi na-load so saray public list natan.

detail.title: Saray Detalye na Listaan
detail.added_success: Mapalar a na-arum so saray salita ed koleksion mo!
detail.added_error: Ag-nayarin i-arum so saray salita ed koleksion mo.
detail.delete_confirm: Seguradon labay mon i-delete iyan public list? Ag-la napa-wil iya.
detail.duplicate_error: Wala ray duplicate ya salita ed listaan. Mitoling, i-ekal iraya antis ya i-save.

profile.terms_welcome: Maliket a isabi ed Synaply. Panamegley na pan-usar mo ed saray serbisyo mi, mipakna ka ed sarayan termino...
profile.title: Saray Setting na Profile
profile.leave_empty: Andi-karga pian ag-onaliw so password natan
profile.subtitle: I-manage so personal ya impormasyon mo tan saray setting na lenguahe

best_practice.title: Sankaabigan a Panag-gawa parad Onatagey
best_practice.strategy_desc: Parad sankaabigan a panag-aral, rekomendaan mi iyan simplin 3-step ya istratehiya:
best_practice.step1_desc: Man-arum na manga 100 ya salita ya aka-focus ed sankasakey a topic (alimbawa: Travel odino Business) pian man-gawa na konteksto.
best_practice.step2_desc: Kaba-tan irayan salita panamegley na inagew-agew a repetition anggad magmaliw iran kabiangan na vocabulary mo.
best_practice.step3_desc: Onalis ed Panag-ensayo na AI pian usaren so balon vocabulary mo ed saray interon sentence tan real-world a konteksto.

getting_started.title: Iggapo la
getting_started.desc: Say Synaply et mabiskeg a tool ya na-gawa pian tulongan kan pabaleguen so vocabulary mo tan paaligwasen so kabat mo ed lenguahe panamegley na spaced repetition tan artificial intelligence.
getting_started.step1_desc: Man-arum na salita na sarili odino usaren so AI pian man-gawa na saray listaan base ed topic tan level.
getting_started.step2_desc: Usaren so Vocabulary Review pian memorisay salita panamegley na FSRS algorithm.

manual.title: Manual ya Pan-input
manual.desc: I-enter so salita ed lenguahe ya aaralen mo tan say translation to. Nayarin man-arum na komento odino konteksto parad sankaabigan a panag-memoria.

auto_translate.title: Auto-translate
auto_translate.desc: Usaren so "Auto-translate" ya feature parad mabiit ya translation panamegley na DeepL ya serbisyo.

ai_list.title: Panag-gawa na Listaan (AI Word List)
ai_list.desc: Man-pili na level (A1-C2) tan topic, tan say AI (Gemini) et man-gawa na listaan na saray importanteng salita parad sika, ya nayarin i-arum ed diksyunaryo mo ed sankasakey a click.

ai_insights.title: Saray Insight na AI
ai_insights.desc: Parad balang salita, say AI et nayarin itarya so saray synonyms, alimbawa na panag-usar, tan saray tips ed gramatika.

spaced_repetition.title: Spaced Repetition
spaced_repetition.desc: Say Synaply et manguusar na FSRS (Free Spaced Repetition Scheduler) ya algorithm pian kwentaen so sankaabigan a panaon ya pan-ulit ed balang salita.
spaced_repetition.step1: I-panengneng ed sika so salita ed original a lenguahe.
spaced_repetition.step2: I-enter so translation tan liseken so Enter odino I-check so Sagbat.
spaced_repetition.step3: No ag-mo nodnonoten — i-click so "Ag-ko nodnonoten" pian nanengneng so sagbat.
spaced_repetition.step4: Say algorithm et kwentaen lamet so ontumbok ya petsa na rebyu base ed sagbat mo.

ai_practice.title: Panag-ensayo na AI: Pan-translate na Sentence
ai_practice.desc: Iyan feature et ontulong ya mang-ensayo ed gramatika tan konteksto panamegley na pan-translate na saray interon sentence ya na-gawa na AI specifically parad sika.
ai_practice.step1: Man-pili na topic (alimbawa: "Business", "Travel") odino andi-karga iyan field.
ai_practice.step2: Say AI et man-gawa na 5 ya sentence ed na-pili ya topic.
ai_practice.step3: I-submit so translation mo tan ma-ala so detailed a breakdown.
ai_practice.step4: Itoro na AI so saray liling tan i-rekomenda so sankaabigan a translation kalingwan na saray deskripsion.

dictionary_management.title: I-manage so Diksyunaryo
dictionary_management.search: Man-anap: Usaren so search bar pian mabiit ya naboan so saray salita ed koleksion mo.
dictionary_management.sorting: Sorting: Nengnengen so listaan na amin a salita mo ya walay option ya i-delete iraya.
dictionary_management.delete_all: I-delete amin a salita: Katunaan ya siguradon i-clear so diksyunaryo mo ed sankasakey a click.

progress.title: Progreso tan saray Point
progress.desc: Say score mo (ed app header) et i-panengneng so bilang na mapalar a na-translate ya salita. No mas atagey so score, mas dakel so salita ya kaba-tan mo la!
